swahili.search_by_name_meaning_clade_or_place: Tafuta kwa jina, maana, klade, au mahali...
swahili.cambrian_explosion_animals_diversify: Mlipuko wa Cambrian — wanyama hubadilika kuwa wengi
swahili.first_four_legged_animals_walk_on_land: Wanyama wa kwanza wenye miguu minne hutembea nchi kavu
swahili.asteroid_non_bird_dinosaurs_end: Asteroidi — mwisho wa dinosaur wasio ndege
swahili.map_of_where_dinosaur_fossils_are_foun: Ramani ya mahali mabaki ya dinosaur yanapopatikana leo, kwa bara
swahili.ornithischian_bird_hipped_plant_eaters: Ornithischian (wakila mimea wenye nyonga za ndege)
swahili.dozens_of_dinosaurs_are_preserved_with: Dinosaur kadhaa wamehifadhiwa na manyoya, kutoka manyoya laini hadi manyoya halisi ya kuruka. Wengi walikuwa na manyoya muda mrefu kabla yeyote wao kuweza kuruka.
swahili.birds_have_a_furcula_or_wishbone_so_di: Ndege wana furcula, au mfupa wa matakwa. Dinosaur wa aina ya theropod kama T. rex na Velociraptor pia walikuwa nao. Ni mfupa uleule kabisa.
swahili.bird_bones_are_light_and_filled_with_a: Mifupa ya ndege ni nyepesi na imejaa mifuko ya hewa. Mifupa ileile iliyojaa hewa huonekana katika dinosaur wengi, sehemu ya mfumo wa kupumua unaofanana na ndege.
swahili.the_classic_bird_footprint_three_toes_: Alama ya kawaida ya mguu wa ndege, vidole vitatu mbele, inalingana na miguu ya theropod. Alama za mabaki za dinosaur huonekana kama alama kubwa za ndege.
swahili.dinosaurs_laid_eggs_in_nests_and_some_: Dinosaur waliotaga mayai katika viota na baadhi, kama Citipati na Oviraptor, walikaa juu yake kuangua watoto wao, kama ndege wanavyofanya hasa.
swahili.birds_fold_their_wings_using_a_special: Ndege hukunja mabawa yao kwa kutumia mfupa maalum wa kiwiko wenye umbo la mwezi mpevu. Mfupa uleule uliwawezesha baadhi ya dinosaur kuvuta mikono yao kwenye mwili.
swahili.fast_growth_warm_bodies: Ukuaji wa haraka, miili yenye joto
swahili.growth_rings_in_dinosaur_bones_show_ma: Pete za ukuaji katika mifupa ya dinosaur zinaonyesha wengi walikua haraka na walikuwa na damu joto, zaidi kama ndege na mamalia kuliko reptilia wa kisasa.

hausa.search_by_name_meaning_clade_or_place: Nemo da suna, ma'ana, clade, ko wuri...
hausa.first_life_simple_microbes: Rayuwa ta farko — ƙwayoyin cuta masu sauƙi
hausa.microbes_fill_the_air_with_oxygen: Ƙwayoyin cuta suna cika iska da oxygen
hausa.first_complex_eukaryotic_cells: Ƙwayoyin halitta masu rikitarwa na farko (eukaryotic)
hausa.plants_spread_onto_land: Tsirrai sun bazu a kan ƙasa
hausa.first_four_legged_animals_walk_on_land: Dabbobi masu ƙafa huɗu na farko suna tafiya a ƙasa
hausa.map_of_where_dinosaur_fossils_are_foun: Taswirar inda ake samun burbushin dinosaur a yau, bisa nahiya
hausa.theropod_mostly_meat_eaters_two_legs: Theropod (galibi masu cin nama, ƙafa biyu)
hausa.sauropodomorph_long_necked_plant_eater: Sauropodomorph (masu cin tsirrai masu wuya doguwa)
hausa.ornithischian_bird_hipped_plant_eaters: Ornithischian (masu cin tsirrai masu ƙugu irin na tsuntsu)
hausa.dozens_of_dinosaurs_are_preserved_with: Dinosaurs da yawa an adana su da gashin tsuntsu, daga laushi mai sauƙi zuwa gashin tashi na gaske. Da yawa suna da gashin tsuntsu tun kafin kowanne daga cikinsu ya iya tashi.
hausa.birds_have_a_furcula_or_wishbone_so_di: Tsuntsaye suna da furcula, ko ƙashin buri. Dinosaurs irin theropod kamar T. rex da Velociraptor su ma suna da shi. Daidai ƙashi iri ɗaya ne.
hausa.hollow_air_filled_bones: Ƙasusuwa marasa kwa cike da iska
hausa.bird_bones_are_light_and_filled_with_a: Ƙasusuwan tsuntsaye masu sauƙi ne kuma cike da jakunkunan iska. Iri ɗaya ƙasusuwa cike da iska suna bayyana a cikin dinosaurs da yawa, ɓangare na tsarin numfashi mai kama da tsuntsu.
hausa.the_classic_bird_footprint_three_toes_: Sawun tsuntsu na gargajiya, yatsu uku gaba, ya yi daidai da ƙafafun theropod. Sawun burbushin dinosaur suna kama da manyan sawun tsuntsu.
hausa.dinosaurs_laid_eggs_in_nests_and_some_: Dinosaurs sun yi ƙwai a cikin sheƙa kuma wasu, kamar Citipati da Oviraptor, sun zauna a kansu don kwantar da 'ya'yansu, daidai kamar yadda tsuntsaye suke yi.
hausa.birds_fold_their_wings_using_a_special: Tsuntsaye suna ninka fikafikansu ta amfani da ƙashin wuyan hannu na musamman mai siffar jinjirin wata. Iri ɗaya ƙashi ya ba wasu dinosaurs damar janyo hannayensu zuwa jiki.
hausa.growth_rings_in_dinosaur_bones_show_ma: Zoben girma a cikin ƙasusuwan dinosaur sun nuna da yawa sun girma da sauri kuma suna da jini mai dumi, kama da tsuntsaye da masu shayarwa fiye da masu rarrafe na zamani.
